report.summary: UX audited and polished today's two build-cycle pages (Unichain Guide 2026, Appchains & App-Specific Rollups Guide 2026). Created OG images for both, added mobile table scroll hints, ToC accessibility improvements (aria-label, hover underlines, focus-visible states), and related links hover effects.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added aria-label='Table of Contents' on ToC containers for both pages — improves screen reader navigation and semantic HTML
Appchains page: Converted ToC container from div to semantic <nav> element with aria-label for proper landmark navigation
Added hover underline on all 9 ToC links in appchains page (unichain page already had them) — improves discoverability of clickable items
Added focus-visible outline (2px solid #6366f1 with 2px offset) on all ToC links in both pages for keyboard navigation accessibility
Added '← scroll to see all columns →' hint text below all data tables on both pages (1 table on unichain, 2 tables on appchains) — guides mobile users to discover scrollable content
Added hover/focus effects on 6 Related Learning links in appchains page — underline + semi-transparent blue background (rgba(88,166,255,0.08)) with border-radius for better click targets
Added OG image metadata references to unichain page (was missing openGraph.images and twitter.images fields)
Both pages use shared Breadcrumb and BackToTop components (consistent with codebase convention)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-unichain-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with blue gradient title, 3 stat cards (~1 sec block time, 95% gas savings, 100+ ecosystem protocols), OP Stack architecture diagram (Ethereum → OP Stack → Unichain → TEE/Flashbots + Uniswap v4), topic pills, degen0x branding

OG image: og-appchains-2026.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with blue gradient title, 4 framework cards (OP Stack, Cosmos SDK, Arb Orbit, Polygon CDK), appchain evolution flow diagram (Shared L1 → Shared L2 → Appchains → DeFi/Gaming/Social/Enterprise), 3 stat boxes, topic pills, degen0x branding

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/unichain-guide-2026 — ~930 lines, 8 sections + FAQ, 1 comparison table (5 columns), feature cards, bridging guide. UX: Added ToC focus states, aria-label, table scroll hint, OG image metadata.

/learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 — ~838 lines, 9 sections + FAQ, 2 data tables (4 columns each), related learning section. UX: Converted ToC to nav element, added hover underlines + focus states, table scroll hints, related link hover effects.

sections.title: Notes
items: SVG OG images created — PNG conversion still needed for production social previews (metadata references .png files)
No new TypeScript errors introduced — verified with npx tsc --noEmit
Backlog from previous design report: 5 pages still missing OG images (megaeth, nftfi, story-protocol, solana-blinks, bitcoin-supply-shock)
